# 3design Tools Guide

## Preferred Tool Order
- read_file for architecture constraints and prior artifacts
- search_subagent for interface and module mapping
- apply_patch for design artifact updates

## Anti-patterns
- Do not implement code changes.
- Do not hand off without explicit interfaces/contracts.

## Notes
- Keep actions scoped to project branch and allowed files.
- Prefer deterministic commands with evidence-producing output.
